sglang.title: Mooncake store get zero copy meta optimization
sglang.author: huangtingwei9988
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
In the get_buffer_meta method, indices is a CPU tensor. The performance of the for loop to obtain the item value of the CPU tensor is poor. indices are converted to list before the for loop starts, which can greatly improve performance
Test Scripts:
import torch
import time

def get_buffe

sglang.title: support fp8 kvcache for hybrid attn backend on GPT-OSS
sglang.author: rainj-me
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
#9782
On B200/GB200 kv cache volume actually blocks the batch size which is the bottleneck for the GPT-OSS performance. And the trtllm-mha cuda kernel could not support Q(bf16), KV(fp8), O(bf16) in prefill phase. That's why I create this PR to use hybrid attn backend (prefill: triton, dec

sglang.title: [HiCacheStorage] fix abort request  host memory leaks
sglang.author: huangtingwei9988
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
The host_indices held by abort request  PrefetchOperation cannot be released, causing the allocatable host_indices to become smaller and smaller. so it is necessary to release the prefetch operation of the abort request to prevent host memory leaks.
Modifications

Accuracy Tests

Benchmar

sglang.title: [router] Fix short timeout for the prefill client
sglang.author: LukasBluebaum
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
Currently, the timeout for the prefill client in the return_logprobs = False path is set to only 2 secs. This leads to many premature request aborts as soon as some load is on the server: #9266 . Here I also set the request_timeout_secs on the prefill client in that path. It might also ma

vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR enables Gemma3n for use with the audio-specific endpoints (transcriptions/translations).
I've also added a "soft" interface changes to add a to_language parameter to the API as I found it helps some with translation.
The rationale is that I would like to keep this changes lightweight for now

vllm.title: [Doc]: Fix CPU install docs: force torch-backend=cpu to avoid GPU torchvision errors
vllm.author: yankay
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
After the #22089
This PR updates the CPU installation guide in by changing the uv pip install commands to use --torch-backend cpu instead of auto.
If auto is used on a GPU server, torchvision may be installed as a GPU version (e.g., torchvision 0.21.0+cu126), which causes runtime errors such

vllm.title: Document multi-proc method selection for profiling
vllm.author: jdebache
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
I have faced some challenges when attempting to profile vLLM with nsys, mostly:

Empty profiles
Partially empty profiles
Crashes on engine initialization

It seems that selecting spawn as the multi-processing method instead of fork resolves most of them. This PR adds the corresponding documentation

vllm.title: Migrate OvisImagePatchInputs to TensorSchema
vllm.author: bbeckca
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR migrates OvisImagePatchInputs from a TypedDict-based definition to a structured TensorSchema model with runtime shape validation. This brings it in line with recent changes to Phi3VImagePixelInputs, and is part of a broader effort to improve input contract enforcement and debug-abili

vllm.title: [XPU][Feature] fp8 online quantization support for XPU
vllm.author: yma11
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
This PR enable online fp8 quantization on XPU platform with corresponding dynamic_scaled_fp8_quant and grouped gemm kernels. Note that need specify dtype with float16 since bfloat16 has poor perf in current used ipex-2.8 whl used in upstream.
Test Plan
Verified on several models with --quant
